intake.user_request: Add semantic headers and unit tests to the 4 CLI entry points: populate.ts, rag-index.ts, rag-search.ts, rag-status.ts. Triple-gap: complex, untested, undocumented at the semantic layer.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Targeted additions to 4 known files — semantic headers and test stubs. No architectural changes, no new modules, no cross-cutting blast radius. Classic light scope: add docs + targeted tests to specific files.

hotspot_files.reason: facet filter resolution + multi-provider search path
complexity unknown from dispatch; large orchestration file

in_scope: Add unit tests for rag-index.ts main paths (argument parsing, local-only enforcement, validation gate refusal)
Add unit tests for rag-status.ts main paths (no-index, JSON output, human output)
out_of_scope: Integration tests requiring live vector stores or LLM providers
Changes to populate-cli.test.ts (existing tests cover populate.ts)
rag-search.ts tests (requires live embedding provider; pure unit coverage is limited)
Any changes to orchestrator, pipeline, or generator code

constraints: Semantic headers must conform to the @coderef-semantic block format already in use across the codebase
Tests must not require live API keys or external services (mock or unit-only)
Test suite must still pass 1496+ tests after additions
Header coverage % must increase from 39% baseline
